title: Minimum Spanning Trees and Network Design · Invariant Lens: Cut Property
summary: Connect sites at minimum build cost while explaining redundancy limits. Planned artifact: Add and verify the dsa2 cut property increment in a minimum-network design and sensitivity brief. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Use safe-edge cut arguments to justify minimum-spanning-tree choices.
Validate reported cost, edge sequence, reachability, and algorithm preconditions.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
